game_name: The Simpsons: Bart vs. the Space Mutants

sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Skateboard
special_mechanics.description: Bart can ride on a skateboard for movement in certain sections. Only usable in one small section in final game.

special_mechanics.name: Jump Attack
special_mechanics.description: Primary method to eliminate disguised aliens is to jump on their heads. Requires precision platforming.

special_mechanics.name: Equipment Items
special_mechanics.description: Bart can use purchased equipment including rockets and cherry bombs to progress through levels and access items.

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. Available sources provide gameplay mechanics and level design information but contain no quantified physics parameters such as velocity, acceleration, gravity values, or sub-pixel precision data. The game is documented as a 2D side-scrolling platformer with notable control difficulty noted in reviews.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - The Simpsons: Bart vs. the Space Mutants (NES)
Wikipedia - The Simpsons: Bart vs. the Space Mutants
